channel.title: Rodrigo Araujo Soria
channel.description: Recent content on Rodrigo Araujo Soria

item.title: About
item.description: Hello there, I’m a Game Designer, Web Designer specialized in Project Managing and a former Digital Marketing Planner from Guatemala.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Technology and Expertise

Day-to-Day Comfort:

  • Unreal Engine
  • Blender
  • Unreal Motion Graphics
  • HTML, CSS, JavaScript
  • WordPress
  • Drupal
  • Hugo Static Site Generator

Experience with:

  • Laravel
  • C++
  • PHP
  • AutoCAD
  • Adobe Creative Cloud
  • Affinity Designer
  • Atlassian Tools

Work Experience

2024 – Today

Project Manager

BairesDev
BairesDev (2024 – Today)
  • Own client-facing communication, ensuring expectations are clear and progress is visible at every stage.
  • Coordinate resource planning and engineer allocation across active projects.
  • Monitor risks proactively and course-correct before they impact delivery.
  • Manage issue resolution quickly to avoid disrupting timelines.
  • Bridge the gap between technical teams and business stakeholders.
2014 – Today

Project Manager / Product Owner

Tribal WorldWide (2024 – 2024)

item.title: Gamble to Win
item.description:
Pull up a chair. The tavern is loud, the drinks are flowing, and the cards are already on the table.

In this custom card game built in 30 days for a game jam, you join a world where playing cards is the oldest way to earn a little extra coin. The rules are your own to learn, the bets are yours to make, and how far you stretch your luck is entirely up to you. Play it safe and walk away steady, or push your chips in and see what fate deals you.

item.title: Scarecrow 9000
item.description:
A wave-survival game inspired by Vampire Survivors build for a one-month Game Jam, but the monsters are crows, and the stakes are a moon vacation.

You’re a farmer with a dream: $3,000 for a trip to a lunar resort. The only problem? Crows are decimating your crops before you can harvest a single thing. Your solution: the Scarecrow 9000®, a state-of-the-art robot built to protect what’s yours.

Take control of the Scarecrow 9000® and fend off endless waves of crop-hungry crows. Survive until harvest time, collect your earnings based on what’s left standing, and reinvest in upgrades to keep the flock at bay. The crows get bolder. Your robot gets stronger. The moon gets closer.

item.title: Hard Shelled
item.description:
Landing Page is full HTML in /layouts/projects/hardshelled-baseof.html

This file contains metadata used for HTML, SEO and Hugo content views.

item.title: AudioRetrato
item.description: AudioRetrato is a compilation of interviews in Spanish with people who have had uncommon life experiences. Every person in the world has something that makes them different from others, and this makes their point of view in live unique. Each episode seeks to understand the unique point of view of the interviewees with the objective of discovering their convictions and motivations that led them to extraordinary life experiences. You can listen to it here.

item.title: TankBot
item.description:
TankBot is a 3D video game prototype that looks to imitate the exciting feel of 2D Shoot ’em up games like Contra and Metal Slug. All assets (3D models, sounds, animations, textures, etc.) in the game are placeholders to exemplify the game experience.

Unlike many other third person shooters with cover up mechanics, TankBot rewards forward aggressive play by boosting the player during combat. If you manage to destroy an enemy robot, you’ll get tools to destroy the rest!
